title: pentanema pygmaeum
intro: Pentanema pygmaeum, also known as dwarf knapweed or small knapweed, is a small perennial plant species in the daisy family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pentanema pygmaeum include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, teas, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
